findings.message: datetime.utcnow() deprecated — use datetime.now(timezone.utc)
findings.fix_suggestion: Usa datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
context_lines: 64 |             "`datetime.utcnow()` devuelve un `datetime` naive en UTC, lo que "

findings.message: datetime.utcnow() deprecated — use datetime.now(timezone.utc)
findings.fix_suggestion: Usa datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
findings.fix_patch:
--- a//Users/INTELIA_Manager/Desktop/BAGO_CAJAFISICA/.bago/tools/rule_catalog.py
+++ b//Users/INTELIA_Manager/Desktop/BAGO_CAJAFISICA/.bago/tools/rule_catalog.py
@@ -64,1 +64,1 @@
-            "`datetime.utcnow()` devuelve un `datetime` naive en UTC, lo que "
+            "`datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)` devuelve un `datetime` naive en UTC, lo que "
context_lines: 64 |             "`datetime.utcnow()` devuelve un `datetime` naive en UTC, lo que "
65 |             "induce confusión con zonas horarias. Deprecated desde Python 3.12."
